_id.description: A UUIDv4 identifier for the message.

_created.description: The timestamp when the message was created.

_updated.description: The timestamp when the message was last updated.

userID.description: The UUIDv4 identifier of the user who sent the message.

chatID.description: The UUIDv4 identifier of the associated chat.

role.description: The role of the message sender (e.g., 'user', 'assistant').

fileKeys.description: Array of S3 file keys, can be empty.

toolInput.description: Optional, tool input schema, no fixed structure.

toolResult.description: Optional, tool result schema, no fixed structure.
